----
**Postdoctoral Research Associate in Human-Computer Interaction**

I am hiring for a 3-year fully funded postdoctoral researcher position for a (preferred) September 2026 entry.

The postdoc will work on the emerging intersections of HCI and Environmentally Responsible AI together with partners such as Nesta, EDRC, GoCodeGreen and the British Library.

The successful candidate will use participatory methods to co-develop an inclusive and collective toolkit to help organisations better understand the environmental impact of their choices. The role involves close collaboration with PhDs on the team, alongside opportunities to develop an independent research profile through academic publications, conference presentations, and participation on research funding applications.

The position is based within the Human-Centred Computing group in the Informatics department at King's College London and offers a competitive salary.

Full Description: [Job Description PDF](https://my.corehr.com/pls/kclrecruit/core_document_api_2.view_erecruit_document?p_key_&p_key_)  

Application portal: [https://www.kcl.ac.uk/jobs/145865-postdoctoral-research-associate-in-human-computer-interaction](https://www.kcl.ac.uk/jobs/145865-postdoctoral-research-associate-in-human-computer-interaction)


Contact for any questions: georgia.panagiotidou@kcl.ac.uk

---- 
**PhDs**

I am always looking to recruit motivated PhD students to work with me in the Human Centred Computing group at King's. I am keen to work with PhD students interested in projects in HCI, data visualisation/physicalisation and sustainability. Look at my publications to get an idea of my interests.

Contact me for funding options.
